title: RiPP PTM diversity - Discovery Results
key_findings: 48 RiPP classes identified with diverse PTM mechanisms
RiPP genome mining remains challenging due to low accuracy
Promiscuous enzyme activity enables discovery of novel RiPPs

discovery_implications: RiPPs represent largely untapped source of novel compounds
Genome mining alone insufficient for RiPP discovery
